menuItems.name: Rasmalai Premium Cake
menuItems.description: Our signature fusion cake: Soft sponge soaked in saffron-infused 'ras' milk, layered with malai cream and topped with crushed pistachios and dried rose petals.

menuItems.name: Lotus Biscoff Baked Cheesecake
menuItems.description: Creamy New York style baked cheesecake on a Biscoff crust, topped with a generous swirl of melted speculoos spread and a crunchy biscuit.

menuItems.name: Dutch Truffle Pastry Slice
menuItems.description: A decadent slice of moist chocolate sponge layered with intense dark chocolate ganache. A classic choice for chocolate lovers.

menuItems.name: Rose Gulkand Tres Leches
menuItems.description: A Mexican classic with an Indian twist. A light sponge soaked in three types of milk flavored with aromatic Gulkand and rose water.

menuItems.name: Ferrero Rocher Chocolate Cake
menuItems.description: Rich hazelnut chocolate sponge filled with Nutella mousse and roasted hazelnuts, finished with a glossy chocolate glaze and Ferrero Rocher truffles.

menuItems.name: Classic Mango Tiramisu
menuItems.description: Italian ladyfingers soaked in a sweet mango reduction, layered with mascarpone cheese and topped with fresh Alfonso mango chunks (seasonal).

menuItems.name: Honey Walnut Pie
menuItems.description: A buttery shortcrust pastry filled with a rich, caramelized honey filling and toasted Californian walnuts.

menuItems.name: Blueberry Yoghurt Mousse Jar
menuItems.description: Layers of light Greek yoghurt mousse and homemade blueberry compote, served in a convenient take-away glass jar.
